description:
X509 Certificates and PCKS12 key-files to be imported into Verify Identity Access SSL databases. Each entry in the list can have four keys: database name; personal certificates; certificates loaded from URL's; and signer certificates. Alternatively a SSL Certifiacte Datbase can be imported from a `.kdb` and corresponding `.sth` file. If a database does not exist on the appliance then it is created before files are imported.

SSL certificates are imported into the appliance by reading files from the file system. Therefore any PKI which is to be imported into the appliance must specify the fully-qualified path or be a path relative to the `IVIA_CONFIG_BASE` environment variable.

name.description: Name of SSL database to configure. If database does not exist it will be created. Either name or kdb_file must be defined.

kdb_file.description: Path to the .kdb file to import as a SSL database. Required if importing a SSL KDB.

stash_file.description: Path to the .sth file for the specified kdb_file. Required if kdb_file is set.

signer_certificates.description: List of signer certificates to import from files, fetch dynamically from URLs, or remove. Each entry can be a string (file path) or an object with operation details.

oneOf.title: File Path [deprecated]
oneOf.description: File path for certificate to import. Filename is used as label.

oneOf.title: Certificate Operation
oneOf.description: Modify the contents of the signer certificates partition of a SSL database.

file.description: Path to certificate file to import

url.description: URL endpoint to fetch certificate from. Format: 'hostname:port' or just 'hostname' (defaults to port 443)

operation.description: Operation to perform: import (from file), fetch (from URL), or remove (from database)

label.description: SSL database alias. Defaults to filename for imports. Required for remove operations; optional for fetch and import operations.

personal_certificates.description: List of file paths for personal certificates (PKCS#12) to import.

name.description: Optional label to include when importing the certificate. If this is not present the CN X.500 attribute is used.

p12_file.description: Path to PKCS12 file to import as a personal certificate/key.

secret.description: Optional secret to decrypt personal certificate.
